titleStmt.title: SII 28.279: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 279. (A.R. No. 433 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north base of the maṇḍapa infront.

p.hi: Achyutadēva-mahārāya Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Kanyā, śu. 7, Friday, Mūlam = 1539 A.D., September 19.

summary.p: The record is erased and damaged. It records the grant of māṭhāpatya-kkāṇi (the privilege of controlling the maṭha attached to the temple ?) and the administration of the temple (kōvil ūḻiyam) along with the rights and privileges attached probably to Āṟṟūr-nāṭṭu-vēḷār, by the several authorities of the temple acting on behalf of the God Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-tambīrāṉār of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Magadai-maṇḍalam in Malāḍu alias Jaṉanātha-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman makāmaṇḍalecuraṉ Accuta tevamakārāyar piṟutivi rācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 6 10 1 § Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa vikāri samvatsarattu kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu saptamiyum cukkiṟa vāramum mūla nakṣatramum peṟṟa nāḷ malāṭākiya ceṉanāta vaḷanāṭṭu makatai maṇṭalam
Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūr tirukkāmīcuramuṭaiya tampirāṉār tirukkoyil Āṟai ṉāyaka maṇṭapattil niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi caṇṭeśvara ṉāyaṉār tiruvāymalarntaruḷic ceyalppaṭikku kāṇikkuṭi timmarācayaṉ muttarai maṉu[ṣa]ṉ koyil Atikāram kā ppuram koyil cipaṉa
yecurā cī tāṉattār Āṉa U vitta ku tiruñānacampaṉta paṇṭitarum periya perumāṉ Āṉa kaṅkāṇi Āṇṭārum koyil kaṇakku tirukkāmicurappiriyaṉum va Uṭaiyāṉ Ampala cevvaṉti nātar Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu veḷāṟku māṭāpattiyakkāṇi nāḷ muppatum Upaiyam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi I �ṇi Āṭcikku Eṅkaḷukku A
ṟṟa Iṟaiyili cuvantiram piramāṇṭam kāṇi kkiya maram kiḻ nokkiya kiṇaṟu koyil cuvantiram Uṇṭāṉatum peṟṟu koyil Ūḻiyamum Eṅkaḷukku Aṟṟapaṭi paṇṇi caṉtirātittavaraiyum tāmum tammiṭa vaṟkattārum Inta māṭāpattiyakkāṇic cuvantiram rap� paṭi Eṅkaḷ U Aṉupavittuc cukattile Irukkavum .
Digital edition of SII 28.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
